arts.ttl: Revealed: Sporting's cut-price fee for Arsenal and Man United target Viktor Gyokeres as Portuguese club make surprise 'thank you' gesture
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has been earmarked with a move away from Sporting Lisbon this summer, with Man United and Arsenal considered the frontrunners to win his signature.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW31 predictions: Manchester derby to finish all square, Arsenal to win spectacularly at Everton
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Paddy Boyd - lead singer/guitarist of Northern Irish alternative rock quartet The Florentinas - for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 31 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Club planing ‘quick move’ to ensure Arsenal pay bigger transfer fee – Gunners priority target will cost them
arts.sum: Athletic Club will try a ‘quick move’ to improve Nico Williams’ contract to increase his release clause and force the likes of Arsenal to pay more for him. arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr reacts with five words after terrible news coming out of Arsenal ahead of Real Madrid clash
Arsenal 'make approach' for £17.5m midfielder compared to Jude Bellingham, Steven Gerrard
arts.sum: Arsenal supposedly make an approach to sign Juventus midfielder Khephren Thuram, who has been likened to Jude Bellingham and Steven Gerrard.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Arsenal replacement named as Arteta set for crucial Everton decision
arts.sum: With Arsenal travelling to Everton on Saturday, Arteta is now looking for a new centre-back to partner William Saliba at the heart of defence. The Poland international is a natural replacement in the heart of defence, and with injury concerns surrounding White, Calafiori and Timber, Arteta can afford few risks in the biggest game of the season.

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Arsenal: What Mikel Arteta's Gunners must do to avoid 112-year worst at Goodison Park
arts.sum: Arsenal have been told what they must do in Saturday's Premier League showdown with Everton to avoid suffering an unwanted 112-year first at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta must address biggest blind spot against Everton with one eye on Real Madrid
arts.sum: Squad management is often pointed to as Mikel Arteta’s biggest weakness

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe and Antonio Rudiger punished by UEFA but cleared for Arsenal game
arts.sum: Real Madrid can breathe a sigh of relief after their players will not face a ban from UEFA which would have ruled them out of the first leg of Champions League semi-final against Arsenal.
